title: Enterprise Architect
description:
**Project Role :** Enterprise Architect  

**Project Role Description :** Define and implement enterprise architecture strategies and operating models. Articulate a compelling enterprise architecture vision, target state, and transformation roadmap.
  

**Must have skills :** .NET Architecture  

**Good to have skills :** Business Architecture  

Minimum **7\.5** year(s) of experience is required  

**Educational Qualification :** 15 years full time education  

  

Summary: As an Enterprise Architect, you will define and implement enterprise architecture strategies and operating models. Your typical day will involve collaborating with various stakeholders to articulate a compelling enterprise architecture vision, target state, and transformation roadmap. You will engage in discussions that shape the future of the organization, ensuring alignment between business goals and technology solutions. Your role will require you to analyze current systems, identify areas for improvement, and propose innovative solutions that drive efficiency and effectiveness across the enterprise. You will also mentor team members, fostering a culture of continuous learning and improvement within the organization. Position Summary Project Role: Enterprise Architect Role Description: Define and implement enterprise architecture strategies and operating models. Convey a compelling vision for enterprise architecture, establish the desired target state, and develop a transformation roadmap. Required Experience and Qualifications Must\-Have Skills: .NET Architecture Minimum Experience: 7\.5 years Educational Qualification: 15 years full\-time education Roles and Responsibilities Lead the design and delivery of AI\-driven solutions using Generative and Agentic AI frameworks to address complex business challenges. Automate processes and integrate intelligent insights into enterprise workflows to achieve measurable business impact. Professional and Technical Skills Strong understanding of Generative and Agentic AI, prompt engineering, and AI evaluation frameworks. Ability to align AI capabilities with business objectives, ensuring scalability, responsible use, and realization of tangible value. Position Overview We are looking for a seasoned Full Stack Enterprise Architect with extensive experience in designing and implementing application\-heavy, multi\-cloud enterprise solutions. The candidate should demonstrate expertise in applications, infrastructure, and integration, with hands\-on knowledge of .NET Core, MVC Framework, and Python. Exposure to modern front\-end technologies such as React or Angular is also required. A robust understanding of AI and its integration into enterprise systems is essential. The role will drive the architecture of scalable, secure, and innovative solutions to support business objectives across various cloud platforms. Key Responsibilities \-Solution Architecture: Design comprehensive, application\-heavy enterprise architectures that integrate infrastructure, applications, data, and platforms across multi\-cloud environments (such as AWS, Azure, Google Cloud). \-Application Development Leadership: Lead the design and implementation of robust, scalable applications with a focus on full\-stack development, ensuring alignment with business goals. \-Integration Strategy: Architect seamless integrations between systems, applications, and third\-party services using APIs, microservices, and event\-driven architectures. \-Multi\-Cloud Strategy: Develop and implement strategies for deploying and managing applications across multiple cloud platforms, ensuring portability, scalability, and cost optimization. \-Technology Leadership: Provide technical guidance on .NET and Python\-based backend systems, as well as modern front\-end frameworks such as React or Angular. \-AI Adoption: Incorporate Generative and Agentic AI capabilities into enterprise applications, leveraging frameworks and tools to enhance productivity and functionality (including predictive analytics and automation). \-Infrastructure Design: Collaborate with infrastructure teams to design cloud\-native solutions, including containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), CI/CD pipelines, and Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Bicep). \-Performance \& Security: Ensure solutions are optimized for performance, scalability, and security, following industry standards and best practices. \-Stakeholder Collaboration: Work closely with product managers, developers, DevOps, and business stakeholders to translate requirements into technical solutions. \-Innovation \& Trends: Stay informed about emerging technologies, including advancements in AI, cloud trends, and full\-stack development practices, to drive continuous improvement. Qualifications and Skills \-12 to 20\+ years of experience in enterprise architecture, with at least 3 to 5 years in a full\-stack architect role focused on application\-heavy solutions. \-Proven experience designing and deploying solutions in multi\-cloud environments (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud). \-Hands\-on experience with .NET Core, ASP.Net, and Python for backend development. \-Exposure to front\-end technologies such as React, Angular, or similar frameworks. \-Strong understanding of AI concepts and their application in enterprise systems. \-Expertise in integration patterns (e.g., REST, Azure Integration Services, GraphQL, Kafka, message queues) and microservices architecture. \-Experience with big data technologies (e.g., Fabrics, Hadoop, Spark) and data integration pipelines. \-Experience with infrastructure components, including containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), serverless computing, and Infrastructure as Code tools (Terraform, Bicep). \-Understanding of DevOps practices, including CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, and logging tools. \-Knowledge of enterprise security practices, including identity and access management (IAM), encryption, and compliance standards. Soft Skills \-Excellent problem\-solving and analytical skills. \-Strong communication and leadership skills for guiding cross\-functional teams. \-Ability to translate complex technical concepts into business\-friendly language. \-Proactive and innovative mindset focused on delivering scalable solutions. Education \-Bachelor s or master s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field. \-Relevant certifications (such as Azure Solutions Architect Expert, Azure AI Fundamentals, TOGAF, DevOps Engineer Expert, or similar) are considered an advantage. Professional \& Technical Skills: \- Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in .NET Architecture. \- Good To Have Skills: Experience with Business Architecture. \- Strong understanding of software development life cycle methodologies. \- Experience with cloud computing platforms and services. \- Proficient in designing scalable and secure applications. Additional Information: \- The candidate should have minimum 12 years of experience in .NET Architecture. \- This position is based at our Mumbai office. \- A 15 years full time education is required.


  

15 years full time education

**Project Role Description :** Define and implement enterprise architecture strategies and operating models. Articulate a compelling enterprise architecture vision, target state, and transformation roadmap.
  

**Must have skills :** .NET Architecture  

**Good to have skills :** Business Architecture  

Minimum **12** year(s) of experience is required  

**Educational Qualification :** 15 years full time education  

  

Summary: As an Enterprise Architect, you will define and implement enterprise architecture strategies and operating models. Your typical day will involve collaborating with various stakeholders to articulate a compelling enterprise architecture vision, target state, and transformation roadmap. You will engage in discussions that shape the future of the organization, ensuring alignment between business goals and technology solutions. Your role will require you to analyze current systems, identify areas for improvement, and propose innovative solutions that drive efficiency and effectiveness across the enterprise. You will also mentor team members, fostering a culture of continuous learning and improvement within the organization. Position Summary Project Role: Enterprise Architect Role Description: Define and implement enterprise architecture strategies and operating models. Convey a compelling vision for enterprise architecture, establish the desired target state, and develop a transformation roadmap. Required Experience and Qualifications Must\-Have Skills: .NET Architecture Minimum Experience: 7\.5 years Educational Qualification: 15 years full\-time education Roles and Responsibilities Lead the design and delivery of AI\-driven solutions using Generative and Agentic AI frameworks to address complex business challenges. Automate processes and integrate intelligent insights into enterprise workflows to achieve measurable business impact. Professional and Technical Skills Strong understanding of Generative and Agentic AI, prompt engineering, and AI evaluation frameworks. Ability to align AI capabilities with business objectives, ensuring scalability, responsible use, and realization of tangible value. Position Overview We are looking for a seasoned Full Stack Enterprise Architect with extensive experience in designing and implementing application\-heavy, multi\-cloud enterprise solutions. The candidate should demonstrate expertise in applications, infrastructure, and integration, with hands\-on knowledge of .NET Core, MVC Framework, and Python. Exposure to modern front\-end technologies such as React or Angular is also required. A robust understanding of AI and its integration into enterprise systems is essential. The role will drive the architecture of scalable, secure, and innovative solutions to support business objectives across various cloud platforms. Key Responsibilities \-Solution Architecture: Design comprehensive, application\-heavy enterprise architectures that integrate infrastructure, applications, data, and platforms across multi\-cloud environments (such as AWS, Azure, Google Cloud). \-Application Development Leadership: Lead the design and implementation of robust, scalable applications with a focus on full\-stack development, ensuring alignment with business goals. \-Integration Strategy: Architect seamless integrations between systems, applications, and third\-party services using APIs, microservices, and event\-driven architectures. \-Multi\-Cloud Strategy: Develop and implement strategies for deploying and managing applications across multiple cloud platforms, ensuring portability, scalability, and cost optimization. \-Technology Leadership: Provide technical guidance on .NET and Python\-based backend systems, as well as modern front\-end frameworks such as React or Angular. \-AI Adoption: Incorporate Generative and Agentic AI capabilities into enterprise applications, leveraging frameworks and tools to enhance productivity and functionality (including predictive analytics and automation). \-Infrastructure Design: Collaborate with infrastructure teams to design cloud\-native solutions, including containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), CI/CD pipelines, and Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Bicep). \-Performance \& Security: Ensure solutions are optimized for performance, scalability, and security, following industry standards and best practices. \-Stakeholder Collaboration: Work closely with product managers, developers, DevOps, and business stakeholders to translate requirements into technical solutions. \-Innovation \& Trends: Stay informed about emerging technologies, including advancements in AI, cloud trends, and full\-stack development practices, to drive continuous improvement. Qualifications and Skills \-12 to 20\+ years of experience in enterprise architecture, with at least 3 to 5 years in a full\-stack architect role focused on application\-heavy solutions. \-Proven experience designing and deploying solutions in multi\-cloud environments (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud). \-Hands\-on experience with .NET Core, ASP.Net, and Python for backend development. \-Exposure to front\-end technologies such as React, Angular, or similar frameworks. \-Strong understanding of AI concepts and their application in enterprise systems. \-Expertise in integration patterns (e.g., REST, Azure Integration Services, GraphQL, Kafka, message queues) and microservices architecture. \-Experience with big data technologies (e.g., Fabrics, Hadoop, Spark) and data integration pipelines. \-Experience with infrastructure components, including containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), serverless computing, and Infrastructure as Code tools (Terraform, Bicep). \-Understanding of DevOps practices, including CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, and logging tools. \-Knowledge of enterprise security practices, including identity and access management (IAM), encryption, and compliance standards. Soft Skills \-Excellent problem\-solving and analytical skills. \-Strong communication and leadership skills for guiding cross\-functional teams. \-Ability to translate complex technical concepts into business\-friendly language. \-Proactive and innovative mindset focused on delivering scalable solutions. Education \-Bachelor s or master s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field. \-Relevant certifications (such as Azure Solutions Architect Expert, Azure AI Fundamentals, TOGAF, DevOps Engineer Expert, or similar) are considered an advantage. Professional \& Technical Skills: \- Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in .NET Architecture. \- Good To Have Skills: Experience with Business Architecture. \- Strong understanding of software development life cycle methodologies. \- Experience with cloud computing platforms and services. \- Proficient in designing scalable and secure applications. Additional Information: \- The candidate should have minimum 12 years of experience in .NET Architecture. \- This position is based at our Hyderabad office. \- A 15 years full time education is required.


  

15 years full time education

title: Full Stack Engineer
description:
**Project Role :** Full Stack Engineer  

**Project Role Description :** Responsible for developing and/or engineering the end\-to\-end features of a system, from user experience to backend code. Use development skills to deliver innovative solutions that help our clients improve the services they provide. Leverage new technologies that can be applied to solve challenging business problems with a cloud first and agile mindset.
  

**Must have skills :** Python (Programming Language)  

**Good to have skills :** NA  

Minimum **3** year(s) of experience is required  

**Educational Qualification :** 15 years full time education  

  

Summary: We are looking for a strong Python engineer who enjoys building reliable, scalable solutions and is curious about growing into AI, ML, and Gen AI. You will be hired first and foremost for your Python expertise, working on analytics, data pipelines, and backend services that power real business use cases. Over time, with structured training and hands\-on exposure, you will expand your skill set into AI\-driven solutions such as predictive analytics, intelligent assistants, and model\-powered APIs. You will work closely with teams across data, platform, and engineering to deliver solutions that are practical, robust, and production ready. Roles \& Responsibilities Build and deliver Python\-based applications and analytics solutions Write clean, modular, and high\-performance Python code Develop and maintain data pipelines and backend services Partner with data and platform teams to ensure high\-quality data for analytics and future ML use cases Contribute to technical designs and engineering decisions, with Python as your core strength Support the integration of ML and GenAI models into Python applications as you upskill Solve technical challenges across teams with a strong engineering mindset Guide and mentor junior engineers on Python best practices Continuously improve code quality, testing, performance, and deployment processes Professional \& Technical Skills Must\-Have (Core Hiring Skills): Strong hands\-on experience in Python development Experience building and supporting production\-grade Python applications Good understanding of data structures, OOP, and Python performance Practical experience with Pandas, NumPy, and data manipulation Working knowledge of SQL and databases Familiarity with backend frameworks like Flask, FastAPI, or Django Sound understanding of software engineering best practices (Git, testing, CI/CD) Good\-to\-Have / Learn\-on\-the\-Job: Exposure to data analytics or analytical problem\-solving Basic understanding of machine learning concepts Awareness of AI, ML, or Generative AI fundamentals (training will be provided) Experience working on cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, or GCP) Familiarity with Docker, APIs, and deployment pipelines Additional Information At least 3 to 4 years of hands\-on Python experience Background in Python backend, analytics, or full\-stack development A strong interest in learning and growing into AI, ML, and Generative AI modeling 15 years of full\-time education required


  

15 years full time education

title: AI / ML Engineer
description:
**Project Role :** AI / ML Engineer  

**Project Role Description :** Develops applications and systems that utilize AI tools, Cloud AI services, with proper cloud or on\-prem application pipeline with production ready quality. Be able to apply GenAI models as part of the solution. Could also include but not limited to deep learning, neural networks, chatbots, image processing.
  

**Must have skills :** Microsoft Agentic AI Architecture  

**Good to have skills :** NA  

Minimum **7\.5** year(s) of experience is required  

**Educational Qualification :** 15 years full time education  

  

Summary: As an AI / ML Engineer, you will engage in the development of applications and systems that leverage artificial intelligence tools and cloud AI services. Your typical day will involve designing and implementing production\-ready solutions, ensuring high\-quality application pipelines, and integrating generative AI models into various projects. You will also explore advanced techniques such as deep learning, neural networks, and image processing, contributing to innovative solutions that meet the needs of diverse stakeholders. The Data Architect is responsible for defining the application s data requirements and structure. This includes modeling and designing the application s data architecture, storage solutions, and integration approaches to ensure robust and scalable data management. Key Responsibilities \-Serve as a subject matter expert in Microsoft Agentic AI solutions, particularly with hands\-on experience in Microsoft AI Foundry, Semantic Kernel, Autogen, Copilot Studio, and Azure AI services including Large Language Models (LLMs) and Small Language Models (SLMs). \-Lead the design and architecture of multi\-agent systems, ensuring seamless integration into enterprise environments. \-Collaborate closely with engineering and product teams to deliver innovative GenAI and Agentic AI solutions that drive measurable business impact. \-Define and implement Responsible AI practices throughout the solution lifecycle, ensuring alignment with ethical standards and regulatory requirements. \-Mentor teams on best practices for agentic AI system design, orchestration, and deployment. \-Drive key architectural and technical decisions across diverse projects and teams. \-Facilitate knowledge\-sharing sessions and training focused on Microsoft s Agentic AI technology stack. \-Continuously assess solution performance and provide recommendations for optimization in scalability, accuracy, and compliance. Required Skills and Qualifications \-Must\-Have Skills: \-Extensive expertise in Microsoft AI Foundry, Semantic Kernel, Autogen, Copilot Studio, and Azure AI services. \-Strong knowledge of LLMs and SLMs, including fine\-tuning, deployment, and enterprise integration. \-Proven track record in designing and implementing agentic AI architectures. \-Practical experience with Python and Visual Studio Code. Good\-to\-Have Skills: \-Experience with Microsoft Azure Machine Learning. \-Familiarity with Microsoft Azure OpenAI Service. Additional Skills: \-In\-depth understanding of Responsible AI frameworks and governance policies. \-Ability to collaborate with cross\-functional teams to deliver scalable AI solutions. \-Knowledge of compliance and regulatory requirements in the AI domain. \-Strong problem\-solving and decision\-making skills. Experience and Education Requirements Minimum of 12 years of professional experience is required. At least 8 years of experience working with Microsoft AI technologies. A minimum of 2 years specializing in Agentic AI Architecture. 10\+ years of experience with Azure Platform as a Service (PAAS). 13\+ years of overall experience in the IT industry. 15 years of full\-time education is mandatory. As a Microsoft Agentic Architect, the role involves designing, architecting, and deploying advanced Agentic AI solutions within Microsoft s ecosystem. The primary focus is on building scalable multi\-agent systems and AI\-powered applications using tools such as Microsoft AI Foundry, Semantic Kernel, Autogen, Copilot Studio, and Azure AI services. The position demands a commitment to responsible development, ethical AI practices, and alignment with organizational objectives. Deep technical expertise, leadership, and cross\-functional collaboration are essential for driving innovation in agentic AI. Additional Information: \- The candidate should have minimum 12\+ years of experience in Microsoft Agentic AI Architecture. \- This position is based at our Bengaluru office. \- A 15 years full time education is required.


  

15 years full time education

title: Custom Software Engineer
description:
**Project Role :** Custom Software Engineer  

**Project Role Description :** Develop custom software solutions to design, code, and enhance components across systems or applications. Use modern frameworks and agile practices to deliver scalable, high\-performing solutions tailored to specific business needs.
  

**Must have skills :** Python (Programming Language), SQL  

**Good to have skills :** Machine Learning, .Net Full Stack Development  

Minimum **3** year(s) of experience is required  

**Educational Qualification :** BTECH  

  

Summary: The Senior software Engineer is a key leadership role within the engineering product team, responsible for overseeing and guiding complex technical projects, driving innovation, and ensuring the successful delivery of high quality software products. This role involves a combination of hands\-on technical work, strategic planning, and team mentorship. If you have the drive to lead and mentor engineering teams, ability to set technical direction for greenfield SaaS products and excellent communication skills to work with cross\-functional teams, including product management and other stakeholders, this position is for you Roles and responsibilities: Technical Leadership: Guide the engineering team on best practices, architecture, and technology choices. Project Oversight: Ensure successful delivery of projects, from concept to production. Mentorship: Mentor junior and mid\-level engineers, fostering a culture of continuous learning. Stakeholder Collaboration: Work closely with stakeholders to align technical solutions with business goals. Innovation and R\&D: Drive innovation by staying updated with the latest technologies and trends. Technical experience \& Professional attributes: Technical Skills: MUST HAVE Expertise in multiple languages (e.g, .Net). MUST HAVE Strong understanding of software design patterns, principles, and best practices. MUST HAVE Deep knowledge of AWS or other cloud platforms (Azure, Google Cloud). MUST HAVE Extensive experience in designing, developing, and maintaining SaaS applications. MUST HAVE Proficiency with CI/CD pipelines, containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and infrastructure as code (Terraform, CloudFormation). Knowledge of database systems (SQL, NoSQL) and data architecture. Understanding of security best practices and frameworks. Leadership Skills: MUST HAVE Proven ability to lead and mentor engineering teams. MUST HAVE Ability to set technical direction and make high\-stakes decisions. MUST HAVE Ability to lead the team as a product owner and drive the delivery of the product vision with the engineering teams. Excellent communication skills to work with cross\-functional teams, including product management and other stakeholders. Strong analytical skills to address complex technical challenges. Ability to operate at highly varying levels of abstraction, from business strategy to product strategy to high\-level technical design to detailed technical design to implementation. Ability to work effectively in an ever changing, complex technical environment. Experience driving for results across cross\-functional teams while maintaining effective working relationships. Must possess strong interpersonal, organizational, presentation and facilitation skills. Must be results oriented and customer focused with an ability to make successful trade\-offs that balance short\- and long\-term product goals. High\-energy, self\-starter with a positive mindset and with a can do attitude. Education qualifications:: \- Bachelor s OR Master s Degree in Computer Science, Information Systems or related field or equivalent combination of education/experience. \- Minimum five (5\) years of experience in software development or engineering roles. \- Proven experience in leading complex, large\-scale projects. \- Previous roles demonstrating technical leadership and architectural design skills. Additional information: You will be working with a Trusted Tax Technology Leader, committed to delivering reliable and innovative solutions Seeking a forward\-thinking professional with an AI\-first mindset to design, develop, and deploy enterprise\-grade solutions using Generative and Agentic AI frameworks that drive innovation, efficiency, and business transformation. Roles \& Responsibilities: Lead AI\-driven solution design and delivery by applying GenAI and Agentic AI to address complex business challenges, automate processes, and integrate intelligent insights into enterprise workflows for measurable impact. Professional \& Technical Skills: Strong grasp of Generative and Agentic AI, prompt engineering, and AI evaluation frameworks. Ability to align AI capabilities with business objectives while ensuring scalability, responsible use, and tangible value realization.


  

BTECH

description:
**Project Role :** Full Stack Engineer  

**Project Role Description :** Responsible for developing and/or engineering the end\-to\-end features of a system, from user experience to backend code. Use development skills to deliver innovative solutions that help our clients improve the services they provide. Leverage new technologies that can be applied to solve challenging business problems with a cloud first and agile mindset.
  

**Must have skills :** Python (Programming Language)  

**Good to have skills :** NA  

Minimum **3** year(s) of experience is required  

**Educational Qualification :** 15 years full time education  

  

Summary: We are looking for a strong Python engineer who enjoys building reliable, scalable solutions and is curious about growing into AI, ML, and Gen AI. You will be hired first and foremost for your Python expertise, working on analytics, data pipelines, and backend services that power real business use cases. Over time, with structured training and hands\-on exposure, you will expand your skill set into AI\-driven solutions such as predictive analytics, intelligent assistants, and model\-powered APIs. You will work closely with teams across data, platform, and engineering to deliver solutions that are practical, robust, and production ready. Roles \& Responsibilities Build and deliver Python\-based applications and analytics solutions Write clean, modular, and high\-performance Python code Develop and maintain data pipelines and backend services Partner with data and platform teams to ensure high\-quality data for analytics and future ML use cases Contribute to technical designs and engineering decisions, with Python as your core strength Support the integration of ML and GenAI models into Python applications as you upskill Solve technical challenges across teams with a strong engineering mindset Guide and mentor junior engineers on Python best practices Continuously improve code quality, testing, performance, and deployment processes Professional \& Technical Skills Must\-Have (Core Hiring Skills): Strong hands\-on experience in Python development Experience building and supporting production\-grade Python applications Good understanding of data structures, OOP, and Python performance Practical experience with Pandas, NumPy, and data manipulation Working knowledge of SQL and databases Familiarity with backend frameworks like Flask, FastAPI, or Django Sound understanding of software engineering best practices (Git, testing, CI/CD) Good\-to\-Have / Learn\-on\-the\-Job: Exposure to data analytics or analytical problem\-solving Basic understanding of machine learning concepts Awareness of AI, ML, or Generative AI fundamentals (training will be provided) Experience working on cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, or GCP) Familiarity with Docker, APIs, and deployment pipelines Additional Information At least 3 to 4 years of hands\-on Python experience Background in Python backend, analytics, or full\-stack development A strong interest in learning and growing into AI, ML, and Generative AI modeling 15 years of full\-time education required


  

15 years full time education

title: AI / ML Engineer
description:
**Project Role :** AI / ML Engineer  

**Project Role Description :** Develops applications and systems that utilize AI tools, Cloud AI services, with proper cloud or on\-prem application pipeline with production ready quality. Be able to apply GenAI models as part of the solution. Could also include but not limited to deep learning, neural networks, chatbots, image processing.
  

**Must have skills :** Microsoft Azure Machine Learning  

**Good to have skills :** NA  

Minimum **7\.5** year(s) of experience is required  

**Educational Qualification :** 15 years full time education  

  

Summary: The role of AI / ML Engineer focuses on the development of applications and systems that leverage artificial intelligence tools and Cloud AI services. This includes building robust application pipelines, either cloud\-based or on\-premises, that are production\-ready. The successful candidate will apply Generative AI models as part of the solution, with responsibilities potentially extending to deep learning, neural networks, chatbot development, and image processing. Key Requirements \-Must\-have Skills: Machine Learning expertise is essential. \-Good\-to\-have Skills: Familiarity with Microsoft Azure Machine Learning, React.js, and Python programming. \-Experience: Minimum of 10\+ years in relevant roles. \-Educational Qualification: BTECH degree required. Position Summary We are seeking a highly skilled Principal Engineer to lead the design and implementation of sophisticated AI and deep learning solutions. The ideal candidate will possess deep expertise in Large Language Models (LLMs), cloud\-based AI deployment with Azure, and comprehensive full\-stack software development experience using .NET and Python. This individual will drive technical strategy, mentor engineering teams, and work closely with product and data science teams to deliver scalable, high\-performance AI systems addressing complex business challenges. Educational Qualifications \-Master s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field. \-10\+ years of professional software engineering experience, with at least 5 years focused on AI/ML development. Technical Experience \& Professional Attributes \-Strong background in working with Large Language Models such as GPT and BERT, as well as deep learning frameworks like TensorFlow and PyTorch. \-Proficiency in Python and .NET (C\#) for the development of scalable AI solutions. \-Hands\-on experience utilizing Microsoft Azure AI services, including Azure ML, Cognitive Services, and AKS. \-Expertise in cloud\-native architectures, microservices, and container orchestration. \-Demonstrated ability to lead engineering teams and make crucial architecture decisions. \-Exceptional problem\-solving skills and the ability to deliver results in fast\-paced and ambiguous environments. \-Excellent communication skills, both verbal and written. Required Skills \-Experience with Natural Language Processing (NLP) libraries such as Hugging Face Transformers and spaCy. \-Familiarity with MLOps practices and tools, including model training pipelines, monitoring, and versioning. \-Understanding of distributed systems and data engineering principles. \-Experience with implementing CI/CD pipelines and DevOps automation. \-Contributions to AI\-related open\-source projects or relevant publications. Additional Information \-PhD or advanced research background in AI/ML or related fields is an advantage. \-You will be joining a Trusted Tax Technology Leader dedicated to delivering reliable and innovative solutions. Additional Information: \- The candidate should have minimum 10\+ years of experience in Microsoft Azure Machine Learning. \- This position is based at our Hyderabad office. \- A 15 years full time education is required.


  

15 years full time education

title: Custom Software Engineer
description:
**Project Role :** Custom Software Engineer  

**Project Role Description :** Develop custom software solutions to design, code, and enhance components across systems or applications. Use modern frameworks and agile practices to deliver scalable, high\-performing solutions tailored to specific business needs.
  

**Must have skills :** Python (Programming Language), SQL  

**Good to have skills :** Machine Learning, .Net Full Stack Development  

Minimum **5** year(s) of experience is required  

**Educational Qualification :** BTECH  

  

Summary The Lead Engineer is a key leadership role within the engineering product team, responsible for overseeing and guiding complex technical projects, driving innovation, and ensuring the successful delivery of high quality software products. This role involves a combination of hands\-on technical work, strategic planning, and team mentorship. If you have the drive to lead and mentor engineering teams, ability to set technical direction for greenfield SaaS products and excellent communication skills to work with cross\-functional teams, including product management and other stakeholders, this position is for you Roles and responsibilities: Technical Leadership: Guide the engineering team on best practices, architecture, and technology choices. Project Oversight: Ensure successful delivery of projects, from concept to production. Mentorship: Mentor junior and mid\-level engineers, fostering a culture of continuous learning. Stakeholder Collaboration: Work closely with stakeholders to align technical solutions with business goals. Innovation and R\&D: Drive innovation by staying updated with the latest technologies and trends. Technical experience \& Professional attributes: Technical Skills: MUST HAVE Expertise in multiple languages (e.g, .Net). MUST HAVE Strong understanding of software design patterns, principles, and best practices. MUST HAVE Deep knowledge of AWS or other cloud platforms (Azure, Google Cloud). MUST HAVE Extensive experience in designing, developing, and maintaining SaaS applications. MUST HAVE Proficiency with CI/CD pipelines, containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and infrastructure as code (Terraform, CloudFormation). Knowledge of database systems (SQL, NoSQL) and data architecture. Understanding of security best practices and frameworks. Leadership Skills: MUST HAVE Proven ability to lead and mentor engineering teams. MUST HAVE Ability to set technical direction and make high\-stakes decisions. MUST HAVE Ability to lead the team as a product owner and drive the delivery of the product vision with the engineering teams. Excellent communication skills to work with cross\-functional teams, including product management and other stakeholders. Strong analytical skills to address complex technical challenges. Ability to operate at highly varying levels of abstraction, from business strategy to product strategy to high\-level technical design to detailed technical design to implementation. Ability to work effectively in an ever changing, complex technical environment. Experience driving for results across cross\-functional teams while maintaining effective working relationships. Must possess strong interpersonal, organizational, presentation and facilitation skills. Must be results oriented and customer focused with an ability to make successful trade\-offs that balance short\- and long\-term product goals. High\-energy, self\-starter with a positive mindset and with a can do attitude. Education qualifications:: \- Bachelor s OR Master s Degree in Computer Science, Information Systems or related field or equivalent combination of education/experience. \- Minimum eight (8\) years of experience in software development or engineering roles. \- Proven experience in leading complex, large\-scale projects. \- Previous roles demonstrating technical leadership and architectural design skills. Additional information: You will be working with a Trusted Tax Technology Leader, committed to delivering reliable and innovative solutions Seeking a forward\-thinking professional with an AI\-first mindset to design, develop, and deploy enterprise\-grade solutions using Generative and Agentic AI frameworks that drive innovation, efficiency, and business transformation. Roles \& Responsibilities: Lead AI\-driven solution design and delivery by applying GenAI and Agentic AI to address complex business challenges, automate processes, and integrate intelligent insights into enterprise workflows for measurable impact. Professional \& Technical Skills: Strong grasp of Generative and Agentic AI, prompt engineering, and AI evaluation frameworks. Ability to align AI capabilities with business objectives while ensuring scalability, responsible use, and tangible value realization.


  

BTECH

title: Quality Test Engineer III
description:
Quality Test Engineer III
Are you an experienced quality engineer with a ‘can do’ attitude and enthusiasm that inspires others?  

And are you eager to work on delivering high quality products to our customers?
About our Team: \-
Our Technology teams use cutting\-edge technologies to build products and systems. We provide our customers with powerful automation solutions. We work to build a culture that values excellent business outcomes and benefits. As a Quality Assurance Engineer, you will be working to support our Customer Services technology teams with ensuring that the tools they are using are working correctly.
About the Role:\-
The primary focus of this work will be working our Generative AI Chatbots and associated tooling, ensuring that these provide a smooth and cohesive user experience and that they meet the requirements of the business. As we work to extend these bots to become more intelligent, there will also potentially be work with other teams on ensuring that everything integrates together correctly.
The primary focus of this work will be working our Generative AI Chatbots and associated tooling, ensuring that these provide a smooth and cohesive user experience and that they meet the requirements of the business. As we work to extend these bots to become more intelligent, there will also potentially be work with other teams on ensuring that everything integrates together correctly.
There will also be additional support required for other items that the Customer Services Solutions teams are working on around Generative AI, including integrations and testing of Generative AI solutions into our standard tooling, such as Oracle Service Cloud. In addition to this, you may also be asked to support some of our other platforms which may require testing. This is likely to include our Support Hub platform, which will be predominantly web\-based testing and automation scripting.
Responsibilities: \-* Test planning \& strategy
* Develop comprehensive testing strategies to ensure quality standards are met.
* Create test cases
* Design and document test cases based on requirements and user stories.
* Smoke testing \& automation
* Conduct smoke tests and implement automation to streamline testing processes.
* Verify design, business flow, intent testing
* Ensure the digital assistant meets design specifications and business flow requirements through intent testing.
* Performance testing includes cross browser and multiple device testing
* Execute performance testing across multiple browsers and devices to validate functionality and responsiveness.
* Documentation
* Maintain thorough documentation of test plans, cases, and results for transparency and traceability.
* Support \& communication
* Collaborate with teams, provide QA insights, and, where necessary, facilitate daily UAT stand\-ups to align testing efforts and address issues in real time.
* Issue Management \& Quality Advocacy
* Identify, track, and manage defects for timely resolution, while championing quality best practices and promoting a culture of quality within the team.
* Collaboration with different teams
* Work closely with development teams to ensure prompt issue fixes and coordinate with team members to perform testing effectively.


Requirements: \-* 3\+ years of QA Test Engineering experience
* BS Engineering/Computer Science or equivalent experience required
* Strong understanding of QA methodologies.
* Experience working with Digital Assistant / Chatbot Technologies (kore.ai is Elsevier's preferred partner)
* Experience with Generative AI concepts
* Strong understanding of QA methodologies.
* Experience of Playwright for testcases
* Strong knowledge of process improvement.
* Strong knowledge of the software development process.
* Advanced written and verbal communication skills.
* Strong project management skills.
* Solid QA testing skills.
* Attention to detail.
* Proven ability to develop and execute automated and performance testing.
* Basic understanding of working within budgets.
* Understanding of industry trends.
* Ability to identify and implement continuous improvement practices.
* Strong research skills (tools/root cause analysis).
* Good oral and written communication.


Work in a way that works for you: \-
We promote a healthy work/life balance across the organization. With an average length of service of 9 years, we are confident that we offer an appealing working prospect for our people. With numerous wellbeing initiatives, family leave and tuition reimbursement, we will help you meet your immediate responsibilities and long\-term goals.
Working flexible hours \- flexing the times when you work in the day to help you fit everything in and work when you are the most productive.
Working for you: \-
At Elsevier, we know that your wellbeing and happiness are key to a long and successful career. These are some of the benefits we are delighted to offer:* Group Health Insurance Policy (covering self and family)
* Group Life insurance/accident policy
* Generous long\-service awards
* New Baby gift
* Subsidized food provided (applies to India\- Chennai)
* Casual Leave, Sick Leave, Privilege Leave, Compassionate Leave, Special Sick Leave, Gazetted Public Holiday and Maternity/Paternity Leave
* Free Transport provided to and from the office (applies to India\-Chennai)


About Us:\-
A global leader in information and analytics, we help researchers and healthcare professionals advance science and improve health outcomes for the benefit of society. Building on our publishing heritage, we combine quality information and vast data sets with analytics to support visionary science and research, health education and interactive learning, as well as exceptional healthcare and clinical practice. At Elsevier, your work contributes to the world’s grand challenges and a more sustainable future. We harness innovative technologies to support science and healthcare to partner for a better world.

title: Lead Software Engineer - AI Platform Engineering
description:
Nasdaq's Generative AI Development Team is seeking a highly skilled and experienced Lead Software Engineer to drive innovation, mentor team members, and spearhead the development of cutting\-edge AI applications.  

  

Your role and responsibilities:  

* Lead and mentor a team of software engineers in the Generative AI Development Team.
* Architect and implement cutting\-edge Generative AI applications, ensuring scalability, performance, and reliability.
* Drive the adoption of best practices in software development, including code reviews, testing strategies, and continuous integration/deployment.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to define technical requirements and translate business needs into technical solutions.
* Oversee the collection, preprocessing, and curation of large datasets essential for training high\-quality generative AI models.
* Lead the gathering of user feedback and iterate on designs to enhance usability and satisfaction.
* Enforce high code standards and best practices through rigorous peer code reviews and mentoring.
* Provide technical guidance and innovative solutions to complex problems faced by the team.


Effectively manage and coordinate geographically dispersed teams, ensuring seamless collaboration and communication.
Expert\-level proficiency in Python, with an understanding of its ecosystem and guidelines.
Experience with AWS and cloud technologies, including serverless architectures.
Proficiency in software development methodologies (Agile, Waterfall, Lean) and ability to lead teams using these approaches.
Proficiency with infrastructure\-as\-code tools like Terraform
Proficient with Visual Studio Code and modern development environments
Experience with version control systems, particularly Git.
Proficient in Linux/Unix operating systems.
Proven expertise in data structures, algorithms, and software design patterns.
Proficiency with infrastructure\-as\-code tools like Terraform
Familiarity with Visual Studio Code and other modern development environments
Knowledge of relational and non\-relational databases, SQL, and handling unstructured data.
Proficiency in Generative AI, including Large Language Models (LLMs), NVIDIA GPUs, Vector Databases, RAG, and MCP and their applications.
Strong leadership and mentoring skills, with the ability to guide and develop team members.
Excellent communication skills, able to articulate complex technical concepts to both technical and non\-technical stakeholders.
Education Required: At least Masters’ Degree or double degree qualified in a discipline related to Computer Science and our industry; or equivalent work experience.
Experience Required: At least 10 years
Special Qualifications: Continues to develop computer engineering qualifications relevant to the industry challenges.

title: DI – Expert Python, GenAI – LLM (CE815SF RM 3882)
description:
**Position: DI – Expert Python, GenAI – LLM (CE815SF RM 3882\)**


**Primary skills: Expert\-level Python, GenAI Frameworks, LLM Integration, RAG \& Search, Vector Databases, Cloud \& AI Services**  

**Secondary skills: 8–15 years in AI/ML development, with 3\+ years specialized in Generative AI and LLM applications.**


**AI Lead Engineer – Generative AI \& LLM Applications**  

**Experience Required**  

**8–15 years in AI/ML development, with 3\+ years specialized in Generative AI and LLM applications.**


**Role Overview**  

The AI Lead Engineer will design, build, and operate production\-grade Generative AI solutions for complex enterprise scenarios. The role focuses on scalable LLM\-powered applications, robust RAG pipelines, and multi\-agent systems with MCP deployed across major cloud AI platforms.


**Key Responsibilities**  

**Technical Leadership \& Development**


Design and implement enterprise\-grade GenAI solutions using LLMs (GPT, Claude, Llama and similar families).


Build and optimize production\-ready RAG pipelines including chunking, embeddings, retrieval tuning, query rewriting, and prompt optimization.


Develop single\- and multi\-agent systems using LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex and similar orchestration frameworks.


Design agentic systems with robust tool calling, memory management, and reasoning patterns.


Build scalable Python \+ FastAPI/Flask or MCP microservices for AI\-powered applications, including integration with enterprise APIs.


Implement model evaluation frameworks using RAGAS, DeepEval, or custom metrics aligned to business KPIs.


Implement agent\-based memory management using Mem0, LangMem or similar libraries.


Fine\-tune and evaluate LLMs for specific domains and business use cases.


Deploy and manage AI solutions on Azure (Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Studio, Copilot Studio), AWS (Bedrock, SageMaker, Comprehend, Lex), and GCP (Vertex AI, Generative AI Studio).


Implement observability, logging, and telemetry for AI systems to ensure traceability and performance monitoring.


Ensure scalability, reliability, security, and cost\-efficiency of production AI applications.


Deep understanding of RAG architectures, hybrid retrieval, and context engineering patterns.


Translate business requirements into robust technical designs, architectures, and implementation roadmaps.


Drive innovation by evaluating new LLMs, orchestration frameworks, and cloud AI capabilities (including Copilot Studio for copilots and workflow automation).



**Required Skills \& Experience**  

**Core Technical**  

**Programming: Expert\-level Python with production\-quality code, testing, and performance tuning.**


GenAI Frameworks: Strong hands\-on experience with LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, agentic orchestration libraries.


LLM Integration: Practical experience integrating OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Azure OpenAI, AWS Bedrock, and Vertex AI models via APIs/SDKs.


RAG \& Search: Deep experience designing and operating RAG workflows (document ingestion, embeddings, retrieval optimization, query rewriting).


Vector Databases: Production experience with at least two of OpenSearch, Pinecone, Qdrant, Weaviate, pgvector, FAISS.


Cloud \& AI Services:  

o Azure: Azure OpenAI, Azure AI Studio, Copilot Studio, Azure Cognitive Search.  

o AWS: Bedrock, SageMaker endpoints, AWS nova, AWS Transform etc.  

o GCP: Vertex AI (models, endpoints), Agent space, Agent Builder  

Preferred Qualifications


Master’s degree in Computer Science, AI/ML, Data Science, or related field.


Experience with multi\-agent systems, Agent\-to\-Agent (A2A) communication, and MCP\-based ecosystems.


Familiarity with LLMOps / observability platforms such as LangSmith, Opik, Azure AI Foundry


Experience integrating graph databases and knowledge graphs to enhance retrieval and reasoning.



**\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\*\***

title: Gen AI Staff Engineer
description:
### **We Are:**


 At Synopsys, we drive the innovations that shape the way we live and connect. Our technology is central to the Era of Pervasive Intelligence, from self\-driving cars to learning machines. We lead in chip design, verification, and IP integration, empowering the creation of high\-performance silicon chips and software content. Join us to transform the future through continuous technological innovation.

 **You Are**


 You are a forward\-thinking AI engineer with a strong foundation in software development and a passion for applying Generative AI and agentic systems to real\-world enterprise challenges. You thrive in environments where innovation meets scale, and you bring a disciplined approach to building production\-ready AI solutions.


 Your expertise spans LLMs, RAG pipelines, and agentic AI frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, and LlamaIndex. You write clean, modular, and well\-tested Python code, and you understand what it takes to move from prototype to production—observability, evaluation, and reliability.


You are familiar with Model Context Protocol (MCP) for secure context sharing and Agent\-to\-Agent (A2A) for connecting AI services across enterprise systems. You’re motivated by the opportunity to transform business processes across HR, Finance, Legal, and beyond, and you enjoy collaborating with cross\-functional teams to deliver solutions that matter.

 **What You’ll Be Doing**

* Architect and develop GenAI, RAG, and agentic AI applications for enterprise functions.
* Design and deploy AI\-powered copilots and multi\-step agent workflows using frameworks like LangChain, LangGraph, and LlamaIndex.
* Build ETL pipelines for document ingestion, parsing, and enrichment, enabling enterprise\-scale knowledge integration.
* Integrate and experiment with LLMs and GenAI platforms (OpenAI, ChatGPT, Claude, Amazon Bedrock, LLaMA) for optimal solution fit.
* Implement MCP\-based context sharing and A2A integrations to enable seamless interoperability across enterprise applications.
* Develop and maintain robust APIs and microservices for secure and scalable integration.
* Implement CI/CD pipelines and productionization practices for reliable deployments.
* Establish observability and evaluation frameworks (logging, tracing, prompt tracking, quality metrics) to ensure system reliability.
* Write high\-quality Python code following best practices for maintainability, performance, and testing.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to translate business needs into technical solutions.
* Optionally contribute to UI development using Angular or React for intuitive user experiences.

 **The Impact You Will Have**

* Accelerate digital transformation by embedding AI into core processes.
* Enable data\-driven decisions through AI\-powered insights and recommendations.
* Reduce manual effort and operational bottlenecks via smart copilots and agentic workflows.
* Promote a culture of innovation by introducing cutting\-edge GenAI capabilities across the organization.
* Improve efficiency, accuracy, and scalability of enterprise applications supporting HR, Finance, Legal, and more.

 **What You’ll Need**

* 5\+ years of hands\-on experience in software development with a focus on AI/ML applications.
* Expertise in GenAI, RAG, and agentic AI systems leveraging LLMs (OpenAI, ChatGPT, Claude, Amazon Bedrock, LLaMA).
* Advanced proficiency in Python, with strong coding discipline (modularity, testing, documentation).
* Familiarity with agentic frameworks like LangChain, LangGraph, and LlamaIndex.
* Experience with MCP and A2A integration for enterprise interoperability.
* Experience building ETL/document pipelines, observability, and evaluation frameworks.
* Strong understanding of CI/CD pipelines, cloud platforms, and production deployment.
* Familiarity with microservices, and modern architectural patterns.
* Experience with SQL, NoSQL, and vector databases.
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field.
* UI development experience (Angular or React) is a plus.

 **Who You Are**

* Innovative thinker with a passion for solving complex problems using AI.
* Collaborative team player who thrives in cross\-functional environments.
* Excellent communicator, able to translate technical concepts for diverse audiences.
* Detail\-oriented, organized, and adept at managing multiple priorities.
* Self\-motivated, adaptable, and committed to continuous learning and improvement.

 **The Team You’ll Be a Part Of**


 You’ll join a dynamic and innovative engineering team at Synopsys, focused on pioneering GenAI, RAG, and agentic AI solutions for internal enterprise functions. The team values collaboration, creativity, and technical excellence, working closely with business stakeholders to deliver transformative AI applications that drive efficiency and business value across departments.

### **Rewards and Benefits:**


 We offer a comprehensive range of health, wellness, and financial benefits to cater to your needs. Our total rewards include both monetary and non\-monetary offerings. Your recruiter will provide more details about the salary range and benefits during the hiring process.

description:

At SAP, we enable you to bring out your best. Our company culture is focused on collaboration and a shared passion to help the world run better. How? We focus every day on building the foundation for tomorrow and creating a workplace that embraces differences, values flexibility, and is aligned to our purpose\-driven and future\-focused work. You'll be joining the SAP Ariba Engineering organization within our Intelligent Spend Management group, where you'll lead a talented team of engineers focused on transforming how enterprises manage their procurement processes.


Your Team: You'll manage a cross\-functional development team of engineers including senior developers, architects, and QA specialists who are passionate about delivering best\-in\-class procurement solutions.


Your Partners: You'll collaborate closely with Product Management, UX Design, and Technical Product Management teams, as well as partner with our global Ariba engineering centers and the broader SAP ecosystem.

title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
description:
**Who are we?**
===============

**Mission**
-----------


Altimate AI is a pioneering seed\-stage startup redefining how data teams function by automating mundane yet crucial data tasks. Our revolutionary AI teammate, **DataPilot**, is engineered to save costs, enhance data quality, and expedite development cycles for data teams. Datapilot's AI agents integrate seamlessly into daily workflows, offering a unique blend of AI\-powered assistance through VSCode IDE extensions, browser\-based applications, and a versatile SaaS platform. As we re\-imagine dev tools with AI, our product is used by hundreds of companies worldwide and a community of thousands of data professionals.

**Team**
--------


As a team, we are Silicon Valley veterans who previously created category\-defining data and AI products loved by thousands of companies worldwide. We have experienced the journey of a small startup to IPO very closely. We have started on a similar journey again and are backed by prominent advisors and VC firms with multi\-billion dollar portfolios.

**What are we looking for?**
============================


We're seeking a Machine Learning Engineer who thrives on innovation and complex problem\-solving beyond conventional coding. Ideal candidates should possess a profound understanding of machine learning algorithms, data structures, and modeling techniques, with a zest to architect and refine the core of our AI\-driven solutions.

**Qualifications:**
-------------------

* 8\+ years of experience in developing and implementing machine learning algorithms and models.
* Advanced proficiency in Python, including experience with ML libraries such as Scikit\-learn, TensorFlow, and PyTorch. Demonstrable ability to write clean, maintainable, and efficient code.
* Experience with advanced text mining methods and the ability to leverage machine learning algorithms to uncover insights, trends, and patterns within unstructured text data.
* Experience with Natural Language Processing (NLP), including the use of Large Language Models (LLMs) like OpenAI's GPT\-3 for text generation, summarization, and analysis.
* (Desirable) Practical experience with cloud services (AWS, Azure, GCP) including compute, storage, and ML services. Ability to design and manage cloud infrastructure for machine learning workloads.
* (Desirable) Expertise in deep learning for NLP with Transformers (BERT, GPT, T5\), RNNs, and LSTMs, and skill in fine\-tuning these models for text classification, summarization, and generation tasks.
* (Desirable) Proficiency in ML experimentation, A/B testing, and model evaluation to inform iterative improvements.

**Why you should join Altimate AI**
===================================

**Projects You’ll Work On:**
----------------------------

* **Development of Advanced ML Models:** Spearhead the creation and finetuning of sophisticated machine learning models that power our AI applications. This involves tackling challenges in NLP, predictive analytics, and data modeling.
* **Enhancing LLM Integration:** Contribute to the seamless integration of Large Language Models into our existing infrastructure, ensuring efficient and innovative AI solutions.

title: Associate Technical Architect
description:
**About Tarento:**

Tarento is a fast\-growing technology consulting company headquartered in Stockholm, with a strong presence in India and clients across the globe. We specialize in digital transformation, product engineering, and enterprise solutions, working across diverse industries including retail, manufacturing, and healthcare. Our teams combine Nordic values with Indian expertise to deliver innovative, scalable, and high\-impact solutions.

We're proud to be recognized as a **Great Place to Work**, a testament to our inclusive culture, strong leadership, and commitment to employee well\-being and growth. At Tarento, you’ll be part of a collaborative environment where ideas are valued, learning is continuous, and careers are built on passion and purpose. **Role Overview:**  

We are seeking an **Associate Architect** to lead the development of high\-performance, AI\-driven web applications. You will be responsible for building responsive React frontends and a high\-throughput backend architecture using **Python (FastAPI)** and **Rust**.
A key focus of this role will be the integration of **Natural Language Processing (NLP)** and **Generative AI** features into our product ecosystem—leveraging Rust for performance\-heavy inference tasks and Python for rapid AI prototyping and orchestration. **Key Responsibilities*** **End\-to\-End Development:** Design and implement scalable features using React (frontend), FastAPI (orchestration), and Rust (performance).
* **AI Integration:** Build and deploy AI\-powered features such as semantic search, automated summarization, and agentic workflows.
* **Hybrid Backend Architecture:** Maintain a dual\-backend strategy—using **Python** for its rich AI/ML ecosystem and **Rust** (via PyO3/Maturin) for high\-speed data processing and model inference kernels.
* **Modern UI/UX:** Create sophisticated user interfaces that effectively visualize AI outputs and handle complex user\-agent interactions.
* **Mentorship \& Best Practices:** Lead architectural discussions, promote type safety across the stack, and mentor junior engineers in modern AI\-integrated development.

 **Technical Requirements:****Frontend (Modern React Stack)*** Core: Expert\-level React (18/19\+), Javascript/ TypeScript, and ESNext.
* Frameworks: Experience with Next.js (App Router), React Server Components (RSC), Node.js frameworks with REST/GraphQL APIs.
* Latest Tools: Proficiency with Vite, Tailwind CSS, and TanStack Query.
* AI Interaction: Experience building "streaming" UIs for LLM responses (e.g., Vercel AI SDK).

 **Backend (Python \& Rust)*** Python Mastery: Expert in Python 3\.12\+ and FastAPI. Proficient in asynchronous programming and Pydantic v2\.
* Rust Excellence: Proficiency in Rust for building low\-latency services or extensions. Familiarity with crates like Axum, Tokio, and Serde.
* The Bridge: Experience using PyO3 or Maturin to optimize Python applications with Rust.
* Data: Advanced PostgreSQL (relational) and Redis (caching).

 **Mandatory Skills:*** Python, Fast API, JavaScript \&React

 **Good to Have" (AI \& NLP Skills)*** NLP \& LLMs: Experience integrating Large Language Models (GPT\-4, Claude 3\.5/4, Llama 3\) via APIs or local hosting (Ollama/vLLM).
* AI Frameworks: Familiarity with orchestration tools like LangChain, LlamaIndex, or CrewAI for building agentic workflows.
* Vector Databases: Hands\-on experience with Pinecone, Weaviate, Chroma, or Milvus for Retrieval\-Augmented Generation (RAG).
* ML Libraries: Basic knowledge of PyTorch or Hugging Face Transformers for fine\-tuning or implementing NLP models (Sentiment Analysis, NER, etc.).
* AI Tooling: Experience using AI\-first development tools like Cursor, GitHub Copilot, or Windsurf to accelerate the development lifecycle.

 **Preferred Qualifications*** Experience with **WebAssembly (Wasm)** to run Rust/AI logic directly in the browser.

title: AI/ML Engineer
description:
We are seeking a highly skilled and hands\-on AI/ML Engineer with 3\+ years of experience in design, development, and deployment of cutting\-edge generative AI solutions integrated with robust data engineering practices. The ideal candidate will work across our AI initiatives, including NLP, deep learning, and end\-to\-end ML/data pipelines.


### **Key Responsibilities:**


### **AI/ML Architecture \& Development**


* Implement and deploy machine learning models in production environments
* Work with generative AI models and NLP techniques (e.g., OpenAI, Claude APIs)
* Apply prompt engineering and retrieval\-augmented generation (RAG) techniques
* Build end\-to\-end ML workflows from data preprocessing to model evaluation
* Contribute to the development of conversational AI solutions

### **Software Engineering \& Data Pipeline Development**


* Design, build, and maintain data pipelines and end\-to\-end ML workflows.
* Build and deploy web services that integrate ML models
* Implement APIs using frameworks like FastAPI or Flask
* Work with databases (preferably MySql) and data processing tools
* Ensure code quality, performance, and security in all implementations

### **Deployment \& Integration**


* Build production\-grade ML models and APIs and deploy them on cloud platforms with the help of the DevOps team.
* Ability to Monitor, analyze, and optimize the performance of deployed models and data workflows with the help of Devops team

### **Collaboration**


* Work closely with cross\-functional teams including data scientists and software engineers
* Contribute to a culture of learning and innovation
* Adapt to challenges even when requirements are ambiguous

### **Technical Requirements:**


### **Programming \& Frameworks:**


* Strong proficiency in Python with hands\-on experience in TensorFlow, PyTorch, Keras, and related ML libraries/Ecosystem.
* Experience with data science tools (pandas, NumPymatplotlib, scikit\-learn)

### **Generative AI Expertise:**


* Knowledge of generative AI models and frameworks, including OpenAI APIs,
* LangChain, LangGraph, Hugging Face Transformers, and related technologies.
* Experience in fine\-tuning large language models (LLMs) and implementing RAG systems leveraging vector databases like Pinecone or similar.
* Experience in developing multi\-agent Retrieval\-Augmented Generation (RAG) applications, integrating automated workflows to streamline data retrieval, processing, and response generation.

### **API Development:**


* Experience in developing and deploying APIs using frameworks like FastAPI or Flask.

### **Qualifications:**


* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering or related field.
* 3 years of hands\-on experience in AI/ML engineering, with expertise in generative AI and data engineering.
* Excellent problem\-solving, analytical, and communication skills.
* Ability to work independently in a fast\-paced, dynamic environment while effectively collaborating with cross\-functional teams.
